message:
perf(indexer): use itoa::Buffer for now_ms in heartbeat_index_run_lock (w32k6)

FILE: src/indexer/mod.rs heartbeat_index_run_lock_with_lock (lines ~1522-1540)

Replaced `&now_ms.to_string()` with a reusable `itoa::Buffer::format(now_ms)`
for the two sites that write the heartbeat's `updated_at_ms=` field. Saves
two small heap allocations per heartbeat (one per branch). Not a per-message
hot-loop win, but concrete and correct; the bead's per-message-hot-loop
targets would require a flamegraph run to confirm hypothesis per the bead's
own risk note.

Added `itoa = "*"` as a direct dep (was already transitive). Wildcard per
AGENTS.md Rust/Cargo rules.

rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_cass_pane2 cargo check
--all-targets: green in 34s.

Partial progress on coding_agent_session_search-w32k6; larger per-message-
loop clone hunt still needs a profiling pass per the bead's P2-speculative
risk section.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,6 +40,7 @@ fs2 = "*"
 lru = "0.16"
 rustc-hash = "*"  # Fast non-cryptographic hashing for cache keys (P1 Opt 1.3), replaces unmaintained fxhash
 xxhash-rust = { version = "*", features = ["xxh3"] }  # Fast content hashing for search-hit dedup (bead sdoxg)
+itoa = "*"  # Zero-allocation integer-to-string for hot paths (bead w32k6)
 smallvec = "*"  # Stack-allocated small vectors for hot paths (Opt 4.4)
 regex = "*"
 portable-pty = "*"
